summary: Comprehensive testing of new Almira Florist features completed. Backend 100% functional with new AI chatbot endpoint. New Logo component and AI Chatbot widget successfully implemented and working excellently.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Occasional technical error responses from LLM integration
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Endpoint functional, may be LLM API key or rate limiting issue

ui_bugs.issue: Product cards may not navigate to detail pages consistently

integration_issues.issue: Text-based 'Tambah ke Keranjang' buttons not found, but cart icon buttons present

passed_tests: NEW: AI Chatbot POST /api/chat endpoint working
NEW: Logo component in navbar, footer, admin sidebar, auth page
NEW: AI Chatbot 'Chat dengan Kami' button bottom-left positioned
NEW: AI Chatbot opens chat window and auto-greets
NEW: AI Chatbot sends/receives messages with product knowledge
NEW: AI Chatbot provides product recommendations (Sansevieria for beginners)
Logo visual design with leaf icon and Almira Florist text
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Fix product card navigation to detail pages. Verify add to cart button text selectors match implementation. Check LLM API key if chat responses occasionally fail.
